data.title: Agnico Eagle Reports Outstanding 2024, Eliminates Debt But Holds On Dividend Increase
data.description: Agnico Eagle Mines (NYSE: AEM) reported strong financial and operational results for 2024, with record margins and debt reduction. CEO stated $1 billion returned to shareholders.

data.title: GameStop Stock Surges Over 8% In Friday Pre-Market: What's Going On?
data.description: GameStop Corp. (NYSE:GME), the renowned video game retailer is trading 8.6% higher in Friday pre-market amid reports of investments in bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies.

data.title: What's Going On With NIO Stock Today?
data.description: NIO reportedly announced breakthrough in aluminum alloy technology. The company faced strong demand for its battery swap services during the Chinese New Year holiday.

data.title: Mark Zuckerberg's Meta Stock Poised To Snap 19-Day Winning Streak As Overbought Conditions, Employee Layoffs Dampen Sentiment
data.description: After Meta Platforms Inc made history on Thursday, advancing 19th day in a row, the stock may not make day 20, as its falling in premarket.

data.title: Asia And Europe Markets Mixed, Gold Advances - Global Markets Today While US Slept
data.description: US markets close higher as producer prices rise, Treasury yields fall. Asia markets mixed with Nikkei down, Hang Seng up. Oil prices rebound.
